plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Helping Hand to access your location to show your position on the map.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Helping Hand uses your location to show your current position on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Helping Hand uses your location to provide navigation and nearby services.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Helping Hand needs access to your location to show your position accurately.
